business.headline: India's ethanol gold rush may be heading towards an oversupply crisisIndia's ethanol boom helped the country hit E20 early. Now distilleries, oil companies and policymakers are confronting a new question. Has India already built more ethanol capacity than it needs?

Who could become billionaires after SpaceX IPO? Meet Musk's inner circleElon Musk may already be the world's richest man, but a future SpaceX IPO could create a fresh batch of billionaires around him. From top executives to early insiders, several members of Musk's inner circle could see their fortunes soar.

Very important: FM Nirmala Sitharaman backs PM Modi's call to cut forex outflowNirmala Sitharaman said PM Narendra Modi's call to conserve foreign exchange is very important as the Iran crisis strains India's import bill and supply chains.

What kept India's petrol and diesel price hike lower than many nations?As fuel prices surged across several countries during the global oil crisis, India saw relatively smaller increases in petrol and diesel rates. So, what helped keep prices in check despite rising crude oil costs? Let's have a look.

Not sure how to e-verify your ITR? Here are 5 easy ways to do itThink filing your ITR means the job is done? Not quite. Many taxpayers do not realise that after submitting their return, they must also e-verify it. The good part is that you can choose from five different methods, depending on what feels easiest for you.

Cheaper crude won't reduce petrol, diesel expenses anytime soonGlobal crude oil prices have slipped below $100 a barrel, but petrol and diesel prices in India continue to rise. The gap reflects earlier oil company losses, a weaker rupee, heavy taxes and lingering geopolitical risks.

Sensex jumps 900 points: Why is stock market rising today?The benchmark BSE Sensex surged 892.05 points, or 1.18%, to 76,307.40 around 9:24 am, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 259.50 points, or 1.09%, to 23,978.80, moving closer to the key 24,000 mark.

Markets rally as crude slips under $100 amid US-Iran peace optimismThe benchmark BSE Sensex surged 892.05 points, or 1.18%, to 76,307.40 around 9:24 am, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 259.50 points, or 1.09%, to 23,978.80, moving closer to the key 24,000 mark.

Sensex, Nifty today: Will stock market fall on petrol, diesel price hike?GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 23,915 around 8:42 am, indicating that the benchmark Nifty50 could open above Friday's closing level of 23,719.30.

Petrol prices hiked by nearly Rs 7.5/litre in two weeks: Check ratesThe repeated hikes in petrol and diesel prices come as India faces mounting pressure from elevated global crude oil prices linked to the ongoing West Asia conflict and disruptions around the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most important oil shipping routes.

Petrol, diesel prices hiked again for 4th time; fuel up Rs 7.5 in under 2 weeksAnalysts have cautioned that continued hikes in petrol and diesel rates could raise transportation and logistics expenses, eventually leading to an increase in the prices of essential commodities and food products.

India's affordable housing dream hits a luxury roadblockIndia's housing market is tilting towards luxury projects even as affordable demand remains strong. Experts say rising costs, weak funding and policy gaps are pushing home ownership further from the middle class.

Would you wait 5 years for gratuity or switch for better pay? Indians speakSome career decisions are never easy, especially when timing complicates everything. Imagine being just months away from gratuity when a tempting job offer lands in your inbox. Do you stay a little longer or switch for better pay? I spoke to Indian professionals, and their answers were surprising.

Insurers cash in on unlimited health insurance, leave fine print to customersHandcrafted ByOur Editors In the second part of The Unlimited Illusion, we examine what insurers really mean by "unlimited" health cover and why customers often discover the limits only later.

Fuel prices up Rs 5 in 10 days, govt defends limited hike amid West Asia crisisPetrol and diesel prices were raised for the third time this month as the Centre said a 76-day freeze had cushioned consumers despite soaring crude.

Petrol, diesel, CNG prices hiked again. Check rates in your cityIndia relies on imports for nearly 85 per cent of its crude oil requirements, making domestic fuel prices vulnerable to fluctuations in global markets. The fresh hike is likely to put additional pressure on commuters, transporters and businesses across multiple sectors.

India better positioned on inflation, RBI should keep rates unchanged: ASSOCHAMASSOCHAM's analysis showed that India's retail inflation increased only slightly from 3.2% in February 2026 to 3.5% in April 2026 — a rise of just 0.3 percentage points. In comparison, inflation in the United States jumped sharply from 2.4% to 3.8% during the same period.

RBI to transfer record Rs 2.87 lakh crore dividend to govt for FY26This move is expected to give the government additional financial room at a time of geopolitical uncertainty and global economic challenges.

Don't file your ITR blindly: These 6 AIS mismatches can invite an income tax noticeThink filing your ITR is just about checking pre-filled details and clicking 'submit'? Not so fast. As the ITR filing season for FY 2026–27 begins, tax experts say ignoring even a small mismatch in your AIS could land you in trouble later.

Haryana is a home away from home for Japanese firms: CM Nayab Singh SainiSpeaking at the third India-Japan Conclave in New Delhi, organised by India Today, Saini said Haryana has become a "home away from home" for Japanese companies and stressed that the relationship between the two sides is built not only on investment, but also on trust.

entertainment.headline: Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh go Ghis Ghis in Welcome 3 song, fans say garda uda diye Welcome To The Jungle has released its new song Ghis Ghis Ghis featuring Akshay Kumar and Akshara Singh. The track blends Bollywood and Bhojpuri flavours and has drawn upbeat reactions from viewers.

Aaradhya watches Aishwarya's global frenzy at Cannes in viral mother-daughter moment Aishwarya Rai Bachchan stopped to greet fans during an outing at Cannes with Aaradhya Bachchan. The video drew attention online to Aaradhya's reaction as the crowd gathered.

Mollywood Times teaser: Aspiring director Naslen wants to save Malayalam cinema The makers of Mollywood Times have unveiled the teaser. The clip shows actor Naslen as a young man determined to become Malayalam cinema's biggest horror filmmaker.

Karan Wahi says men rarely talk about heartbreaks: Most just switch off Actor Karan Wahi said men rarely talk openly about heartbreak and often shut down after breakups. He also expressed that television needs more feel-good romance because audiences still connect with relatable love stories.

Kara OTT release: When and where to watch Dhanush's action thriller Dhanush-starrer Kara will begin streaming soon. The digital release takes Vignesh Raja's justice-driven crime thriller to a wider audience after its theatrical run.

Salman Khan back on Instagram after brief account deactivation Salman Khan's Instagram account was briefly deactivated on Monday. However, it was restored within minutes, leaving the superstar's fans breathing a sigh of relief.

Rekha shoves past fan at airport in old viral video. Internet divided over reaction An old viral video shows Rekha moving aside a fan who appeared to seek a picture at Mumbai airport. The incident has divided internet, with some criticising her for ignoring the fan and others defending her right to privacy and personal boundaries. while others defended her right to privacy and personal boundaries.

Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal introduce baby Vihaan to paparazzi at airport Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal introduced their newborn son, Vihaan Kaushal, to photographers at Mumbai airport. The brief exchange stood out as a rare public moment for the couple during their trip out of the city.

Prabhas gave me courage during depression: Telugu actor Jagapathi Babu Jagapathi Babu has recalled how Prabhas reassured and supported him during depression. He also praised SS Rajamouli and his family for being humble and fair.

Boman Irani praises Ram Charan's humility: He makes everyone feel comfortable Actor Boman Irani said his Peddi co-star Ram Charan makes people feel comfortable on the sets. He also shared the film is larger and more layered than the trailer suggests.

Bharatanatyam held hostage! Outrage over Ananya's Chand Mera Dil scene explained A Bharatanatyam-inspired fusion act from Chand Mera Dil has triggered massive online backlash, with classical dancers accusing Ananya Panday's performance of reducing an ancient art form to aesthetic chaos. But the internet may also be missing one key detail: the scene was never meant to be pure Bharatanatyam in the first place.

Does Jr NTR die before interval in Dragon? Wild fan theories spark fresh buzz Fans are abuzz with theories about Jr NTR's upcoming film Dragon, speculating that his character might die before the interval and return in another form. Despite the excitement, the makers have not confirmed any such plot twist, leaving the speculation purely in the realm of fan imagination.

Desi Bling couple Satish, Tabinda Sanpal face backlash for normalising infidelity Satish and Tabinda Sanpal drew backlash after her comments on Desi Bling about his partying with different women went viral. The remarks prompted criticism from social media users and public figures who said they normalised infidelity.

Declare Tiny Tom public nuisance: Malayalam director slams actor's communal remarks Filmmaker MA Nishad mocked actor Tiny Tom in a social media post as allegations against the actor continued to stir debate in the Malayalam film industry. The exchange has kept the dispute involving actors Ansiba Hassan, Nina Kurup and Lakshmipriya in public view.

Desi Bling or Bollywood bling? Krystle D'Souza, AP set off dating rumours A party clip shows Desi Bling's AP appearing to kiss actor Krystle D'Souza on the cheek. The brief moment has triggered dating rumours as the show continues to climb up the popularity charts.

Actor Idris Elba clears the air on rumours around next James Bond casting With the race to find the next 007 heating up, Hollywood actor Idris Elba has responded to the long-running Bond speculation. Actors Jacob Elordi, Callum Turner, and others are currently in the race.

Bhumi Pednekar horrified by viral video of men groping women's poster in viral video Actor Bhumi Pednekar condemned a viral video showing men allegedly making obscene gestures at a woman's wall painting near a swimming pool. She appealed for stricter laws, while talking about women's safety.

Lord Nataraja is suffering: Internet roasts Ananya's dance clip in Chand Mera Dil A dance sequence from Ananya Panday's Chand Mera Dil has triggered strong reactions online. Several X users criticised the video and called it a poor interpretation of Bharatanatyam.

Drishyam 3 box office Day 4: Film records solid Sunday, earns Rs 141 crore globally Actor Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 posted a slight jump on its first Sunday, earning Rs 13.95 crore nett in India. Strong Keralam footfalls and steady overseas support pushed the film's worldwide total to Rs 141.34 crore.

general news.headline: Divorced daughter better than a dead one: MP government on Twisha Sharma caseThe Supreme Court said an independent agency should investigate Twisha Sharma's death and backed the Madhya Pradesh government's move for a CBI probe.

Trump's Abraham Accords push puts Pakistan in existential bindUS President Donald Trump has reportedly urged Pakistan and several Muslim-majority nations to join the Abraham Accords after the Iran war ends, placing Shehbaz Sharif in a difficult spot as he balances growing US pressure with Pakistan's deeply sensitive public stance on Palestine.

Why BJP picked Haryana CM Saini to spearhead Mission PunjabFrom wearing a saffron turban at every Punjab event to attacking the AAP on governance and law and order, Haryana CM Nayab Singh Saini has become the BJP's most visible face in Punjab. Saini is at the forefront as the BJP attempts to build a non-Jat social coalition for the 2027 Assembly polls in its biggest Punjab push in decades.

Cheaper crude won't reduce petrol, diesel expenses anytime soonGlobal crude oil prices have slipped below $100 a barrel, but petrol and diesel prices in India continue to rise. The gap reflects earlier oil company losses, a weaker rupee, heavy taxes and lingering geopolitical risks.

Was this toughest UPSC Prelims ever? Even bureaucrats struggled to solve paperMore than eight lakh aspirants appeared for the first level of one of India's most competitive and coveted recruitment tests, the Civil Services exam. Many aspirants and mentors are saying this was the toughest paper ever. They are asking if the UPSC questions have become exhaustive, or simply more unpredictable.

'Nishesh, Nishesh' echoes at Roland Garros after Indian-origin star's 1st round winFrench Open 2026: Indian-origin Nishesh Basavareddy stunned No. 7 seed Taylor Fritz at Roland Garros, then won over the Paris crowd with a French speech after sealing the biggest win of his young career.

BJP spokesperson by day, rockstar by night: Nalin Kohli leaves crowd groovingBJP spokesperson Nalin Kohli swapped TV debates for rock 'n' roll at Delhi's The Piano Man, performing alongside sister Vandana. Rooted in their Kolkata upbringing and Rabindra Sangeet training, the duo's high-energy act surprised audiences and sparked buzz online, with one viral reaction on X calling him "pravakta (spokesperson) by day, rockstar by night."

Pained by narrative that judiciary delaying trial: SC on Twisha Sharma death caseThe court stressed the need for a fair and impartial investigation, asked both sides to avoid public statements, and urged the media not to amplify comments made by family members during the ongoing probe.

Is Pronto recording jobs at your home with AI body cams? Bengaluru startup reactsPronto defended its use of cameras during select opt-in home service bookings after privacy concerns were raised on X. The debate led to questions about recordings inside private homes, while Urban Company said it does not follow any such practice.

Student ribs Mumbai Indians in graduation speech, Nita Ambani is in splits. WatchA student of Dhirubhai Ambani International School sprinkled his graduation speech with a Mumbai Indians joke, drawing laughter from Nita Ambani and the audience.

India moves closer to mega Rafale fighter jet deal, finalises request letterIndia has finalised a Letter of Request to France for 114 Rafale fighter aircraft. The proposed deal pairs a major local manufacturing push with a wider India-France defence partnership.

Who could become billionaires after SpaceX IPO? Meet Musk's inner circleElon Musk may already be the world's richest man, but a future SpaceX IPO could create a fresh batch of billionaires around him. From top executives to early insiders, several members of Musk's inner circle could see their fortunes soar.

But the internet may also be missing one key detail: the scene was never meant to be pure Bharatanatyam in the first place.

Said he'd be back for dinner: Indian-origin Uber driver killed in New Zealand crashIndian-origin Uber driver Ramandeep Dhillon was killed in a two-vehicle crash on Te Puke Highway in New Zealand. His death has left his young family grieving as friends and the community rally around them.

India's ethanol gold rush may be heading towards an oversupply crisisIndia's ethanol boom helped the country hit E20 early. Now distilleries, oil companies and policymakers are confronting a new question. Has India already built more ethanol capacity than it needs?

Doping Olympics' sprinters miss Bolt's record, clean athletes win despite oddsThe inaugural Enhanced Games in Las Vegas promised a superhuman, drug-fuelled show. Instead, clean athletes gatecrashed the party, leaving doping advocates with an awkward reality check.

Plane rips through woman's parachute over Alps. Video captures terrifying momentA sightseeing plane flew through Sabrina's paraglider canopy near Schmittenhöhe in northern Austria. The first-person footage of her emergency parachute deployment and survival has gone viral online.

6 Bengaluru cops suspended after explosives found near PM Modi's convoy routeSix policemen were suspended after two gelatin sticks were found during security checks ahead of Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Bengaluru visit. The discovery has triggered an inquiry, while BJP leader BY Vijayendra called it a serious security lapse.

Another BJD MP quits party amid turmoil, buzz grows over BJP switchBJD Rajya Sabha MP Debashish Samantaray resigned from the party, saying he felt belittled over time. His exit adds to the party's post-election turmoil as speculation grows over a possible move to the BJP.

Bihar commuters stranded in 42°C honk in protest, cops ease VIP roadblockThe road closure in Bihar's Motihari left hundreds of commuters stranded in sweltering heat, with temperatures hovering around 42°C. As the delay stretched on, frustrated motorists began honking in protest, creating a sustained chorus that lasted several minutes.

Watch: Marco Rubio's stunning pre-birthday bash in Delhi. Courtesy Village PeopleUS Secretary of State Marco Rubio was surprised with an early birthday celebration by Village People at Bharat Mandapam in New Delhi. The moment unfolded during the US independence anniversary event, which also featured a performance by AR Rahman.

60-year-old guard beaten, mowed down by SUV twice after minor dispute in DelhiA 60-year-old security guard was allegedly beaten with a stick and run over twice by an SUV in Delhi's Paschim Vihar West area after a dispute with its occupants. CCTV footage captured the sequence of events, while skid marks and forensic evidence have strengthened police suspicion that the killing was deliberate.

Rs 1.5 lakh in 23 days: ITI pass-out says no to job, earns through organic farmingAkhilesh Maurya, an ITI-trained graduate from Mau, Uttar Pradesh, turned to organic cucumber farming after returning home. His reported earnings and low cultivation costs have brought focus to crop diversification and village-based livelihoods in present time.

Rain coming: Satellite shows big cloud surge, yellow alert in these statesA western disturbance visible on INSAT-3DS imagery has triggered yellow alerts across the Himalayan states. The same satellite view also shows strengthening monsoon signals near Kerala, pointing to an early onset window.

sports.headline: 'Nishesh, Nishesh' echoes at Roland Garros after Indian-origin star's 1st round win French Open 2026: Indian-origin Nishesh Basavareddy stunned No. 7 seed Taylor Fritz at Roland Garros, then won over the Paris crowd with a French speech after sealing the biggest win of his young career.

Doping Olympics' sprinters miss Bolt's record, clean athletes win despite odds The inaugural Enhanced Games in Las Vegas promised a superhuman, drug-fuelled show. Instead, clean athletes gatecrashed the party, leaving doping advocates with an awkward reality check.

Australia pace legend set to retire from ICC events after Women's T20 World Cup Australian fast bowler Megan Schutt has confirmed that the 2026 Women's T20 World Cup in England and Wales will be her final ICC tournament, bringing the curtain down on a decorated global career.

Vidit Gujrathi storms into Esports Chess World Cup Qualifier final Vidit Gujrathi reached the grand final of the India Rising: Road to EWC qualifiers and is now one win away from securing a spot at the 2026 Esports World Cup chess event.

Novak Djokovic challenges Aryna Sabalenka with special dance move French Open 2026: Novak Djokovic revived his viral battle dance celebration and playfully challenged Aryna Sabalenka after his victory over Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard on Sunday, May 24.

Axar Patel backs SRH to win IPL 2026 title: That top 3 is formidable Delhi Capitals captain Axar Patel backs SunRisers Hyderabad to win the IPL this season. Axar said that if the top 3 click for SRH it might be difficult to stop the team from a title charge.

After Virat Kohli spat, Travis Head's wife reveals facing hate, brutal online abuse Jessica Head revealed she faced fresh online abuse and trolling after Travis Head's on-field spat with Virat Kohli during the IPL 2026 clash between Sunrisers Hyderabad and Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

How India treats its champions: Record-breakers left hauling poles on e-rickshaw Hours after shattering the national record with identical 5.45m leaps at the 2026 Federation Cup, a viral video exposed India's top pole vaulters Dev Meena and Kuldeep Kumar hauling their 5m poles on a cramped e-rickshaw.

Day 2 schedule: Iga Swiatek, Elena Rybakina aim strong start Day 2 of the French Open 2026 brings a packed slate of opening-round action with top stars beginning their campaigns across all three show courts. Iga Swiątek and Elena Rybakina headline the action on Centre Court as they launch their title bids in Paris.

Criticised, trolled, not fully fit: Riyan still dares to chase Warne's RR legacy IPL 2026: Heavily criticised for both his on-field and off-field decisions, Riyan Parag battled injury to lead Rajasthan Royals into the playoffs. Now, he has the chance to match Shane Warne's legacy by becoming the first RR captain since 2008 to lift the IPL trophy and deliver Rajasthan's second title in franchise history.

Punjab Kings, are you proud of the season you had? Punjab Kings were knocked out of the IPL playoffs race after Rajasthan Royals snuck into the fourth spot in the league table. Punjab endured a difficult season on and off the field.

Lionel Messi picks up injury, leaves Argentina and fans worried for World CupLionel Messi left Inter Miami's match against Philadelphia Union after appearing to hurt his hamstring. The scare overshadowed Miami's 6-4 win and left Argentina fans concerned.

Novak Djokovic survives early scare, dances his way into second roundFrench Open 2026: Novak Djokovic recovered from a set down to beat Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard in four sets at Roland Garros. The win eased shoulder concerns and set up another meeting with a French opponent.

IPL Play Of The Day: RR unleash Jofra Archer masterplan to punch playoff ticketRajasthan Royals sent Jofra Archer up the order and he blew Mumbai Indians off the script with a 15-ball 32 before sealing the win with the ball. The gamble showed RR's tactical nerve at a playoff crossroads and allowed Archer to repay the faith the franchise put in him.

Who is Nishesh Basavareddy? 21-year-old Indian-origin man ousts Fritz at French OpenFrench Open: Nishesh Basavareddy, a 21-year-old American wildcard of Indian origin, announced himself on one of tennis' biggest stages after stunning seventh seed Taylor Fritz in the opening round of the Roland Garros on Sunday.

Kieron Pollard raises questions on Hardik Pandya's MI captaincyMumbai Indians' batting coach Kieron Pollard admitted that Hardik Pandya's stint as captain has not gone the way either the player or the management would have wanted. Pollard also hinted at internal discussions over the team's future after Mumbai Indians finished ninth in the standings.

Emotional Pep Guardiola breaks down in tears in Manchester City farewellPep Guardiola could not hold back his emotions as Manchester City players formed a guard of honour for Bernardo Silva during an emotional farewell at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday.

Premier League: Tottenham survive as West Ham suffer relegation on final dayTottenham Hotspur narrowly avoided relegation from the Premier League on a dramatic final day of the season, surviving with a tense 1-0 win over Everton while West Ham United were condemned to the Championship despite beating Leeds United 3-0 on Sunday.

Punjab's toxic social media game backfires after Rajasthan reach IPL playoffsPunjab Kings were brutally roasted by Rajasthan Royals on social media after they beat Punjab to seal the final playoffs spot on Sunday, May 24. Punjab have been caught in several off-field controversies this season.

Bruno Fernandes breaks Premier League's assist record to cap stellar seasonBruno Fernandes supplied his 21st assist of the Premier League season as Patrick Dorgu headed Manchester United ahead at Brighton. This completed a stellar season for Fernandes and United.

National record falls twice as Kuldeep and Dev Meena light up men's pole vaultKuldeep Kumar and Dev Meena lit up the Federation Cup 2026 in Ranchi with a gripping pole vault contest on Sunday, as the duo broke the men's National Record twice before finishing as joint record holders.

IPL 2026 playoffs: RCB vs GT in Qualifier 1, SRH vs RR in EliminatorThe playoffs for IPL 2026 have been set after Rajasthan Royals defeated Mumbai Indians by 30 runs in the first match of Sunday's double-header at the Wankhede Stadium. Royal Challengers Bengaluru will now face Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 1, while Rajasthan Royals will take on Sunrisers Hyderabad in the Eliminator.

MI vs RR: Archer storm pushes Rajasthan into playoffs, dumps PBKS and KKR outJofra Archer starred with 32 off 15 and 3 for 17 as Rajasthan Royals beat Mumbai Indians and reached the playoffs. The win for the Royals mean that KKR and PBKS have been knocked out of the tournament.

Suryakumar Yadav slams wrist injury rumours: People don't understand cricketIndia's T20 captain Suryakumar Yadav has firmly dismissed rumours surrounding an alleged wrist injury, saying those questioning his fitness "don't understand cricket" and insisting his shot-making itself is proof that he is fully fit.

KKR vs DC highlights: Kuldeep Yadav rattles Kolkata, KKR finish 7th in IPL tableKKR vs DC highlights, IPL 2026: Kuldeep Yadav marked his return in a stunning three-wicket haul to complement KL Rahul's blazing half-century at the top as Delhi Capitals outclassed an out-of-sorts Kolkata Knight Riders by 40 runs, in an inconsequential final league match of the IPL on Sunday.

MI vs RR: Jadeja makes Shardul pay for costly no-ball with banter, boundariesShardul Thakur thought he had Ravindra Jadeja, only for a no-ball to drag him back. Jadeja answered with banter, two boundaries and laughter on both sides.

Warner says SRH still have him blocked on social media: Never getting unblockedDavid Warner said Sunrisers Hyderabad still appears to have him blocked on Instagram. The exchange reopened an old rupture between player and team, despite one of the IPL's most successful partnerships.

Marta Kostyuk fights tears, trauma, missile strike scare to reach second roundFrench Open: Marta Kostyuk battled through an emotional morning to defeat Oksana Selekhmeteva 6-2, 6-3 and reach the second round. Kostyuk said she had spent part of the morning crying after a missile strike destroyed a building near her parents' home in Ukraine.

MI vs RR: No Bumrah vs Sooryavanshi 2.0 as Mumbai rest star pacer for final gameMumbai Indians rested Jasprit Bumrah for their final IPL 2026 league game against Rajasthan Royals. The call denied Wankhede a renewed duel with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as RR chase a win to qualify for the playoffs.

Day 1 Highlights: Basavareddy stuns Taylor Fritz, Djokovic into 2nd roundFrench Open, Day 1 Highlights: Indian origin Nishesh Basavareddy has stunned seventh seed Taylor Fritz. Playing his first main draw of the French Open, the Indian origin player stuns the 7th seed in a 4-set encounter. Meanwhile, Novak Dokovic needed four sets to beat lower-ranked Giovanni in his opening round.

China teen stuns athletics world with second-best women's javelin throw in historyChina's 18-year-old Yan Ziyi uncorked a 71.74m throw on her first attempt at the Xiamen Diamond League. The effort made the teenager second on the all-time list and brought the world record into view.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
